expected_value_creation: A command taxonomy and registry will cut repeated CLI-reading overhead and improve command selection accuracy for both humans and AI.
beneficiary: AOF self-hosting operators, maintainers, and AI orchestration sessions
supporting_evidence: The proposal identifies context routing as the central problem rather than command insufficiency.
Current CLI naming is coherent enough to support categorization without semantic rewrite.
AOF already relies on recognition packets, so a smaller command-routing surface has a natural insertion point.
success_criteria: A command taxonomy is defined and applied to the current CLI surface.
A command registry artifact exists and is referenceable from the AI recognition packet.
Major operator paths can be found without reading the full CLI reference.
No existing command meaning or governance boundary is weakened.
